languages.text: {n}Не глядя на Эоганна, Тервантьяс бросает:{/n} "Твои извинения меня не удовлетворили, мон-кай. Единственное, что ты заслужил — это удаление языка, но я займусь этим позже".

{n}Without sparing Eogunn a glance, Tervantias snaps,{/n} "Your apologies failed to satisfy me, mon-keigh. The only thing you have earned is the removal of your tongue, but I will attend to that later."
languages.original_text: {n}Не глядя на Эоганна, Тервантьяс бросает:{/n} "Твои извинения меня не удовлетворили, мон-кай. Единственное, что ты заслужил — это удаление языка, но я займусь этим позже".

{n}Without sparing Eogunn a glance, Tervantias snaps,{/n} "Your apologies failed to satisfy me, mon-keigh. The only thing you have earned is the removal of your tongue, but I will attend to that later."

languages.text: {n}Ohne Eogunn eines Blickes zu würdigen, erklärt Tervantias knapp:{/n} "Eure Entschuldigung hat mich nicht befriedigt, Chem-Pan-Sey. Ihr habt Euch damit lediglich die Entfernung Eurer Zunge verdient, aber dazu kommen wir später."
languages.original_text: {n}Without sparing Eogunn a glance, Tervantias snaps,{/n} "Your apologies failed to satisfy me, mon-keigh. The only thing you have earned is the removal of your tongue, but I will attend to that later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ohne Eogunn eines Blickes zu würdigen, erklärt Tervantias knapp:{/n} "Eure Entschuldigung hat mich nicht befriedigt, Chem-Pan-Sey. Ihr habt Euch damit lediglich die Entfernung Eurer Zunge verdient, aber dazu kommen wir später."

languages.text: {n}Sans même accorder un regard à Eogunn, Tervantias ajoute :{/n} « Vos excuses ont échoué à me satisfaire, mon-keigh. Vous ne méritez rien d'autre qu'une ablation de la langue, que j'effectuerai sous peu. »
languages.original_text: {n}Without sparing Eogunn a glance, Tervantias snaps,{/n} "Your apologies failed to satisfy me, mon-keigh. The only thing you have earned is the removal of your tongue, but I will attend to that later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sans même accorder un regard à Eogunn, Tervantias ajoute :{/n}« Vos excuses ont échoué à me satisfaire, mon-keigh. Vous ne méritez rien d'autre qu'une ablation de la langue, que j'effectuerai sous peu. »

languages.text: {n}Sin dirigir una sola mirada a Eogunn, Tervantias contesta,{/n} «Tus disculpas no me satisfacen, mon-keigh. Lo único que te has ganado es que extirpe tu lengua. Me ocuparé de ello más adelante».
languages.original_text: {n}Without sparing Eogunn a glance, Tervantias snaps,{/n} "Your apologies failed to satisfy me, mon-keigh. The only thing you have earned is the removal of your tongue, but I will attend to that later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sin dirigir una sola mirada a Eogunn, Tervantias contesta,{/n} «Tus disculpas no me satisfacen, mon-keigh. Lo único que te has ganado es que extirpe tu lengua. Me ocuparé de ello más adelante».

languages.text: {n}Tervantias, Eogunn'un yüzüne bakmadan terslemeye başlıyor.{/n} "Özürlerin beni tatmin etmedi mon-keigh. Bugün bir tek dilinin kesilmesi hakkı kazandın, o konuyla da daha sonra ilgileneceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}Without sparing Eogunn a glance, Tervantias snaps,{/n} "Your apologies failed to satisfy me, mon-keigh. The only thing you have earned is the removal of your tongue, but I will attend to that later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias, Eogunn'un yüzüne bakmadan terslemeye başlıyor.{/n} "Özürlerin beni tatmin etmedi mon-keigh. Bugün bir tek dilinin kesilmesi hakkı kazandın, o konuyla da daha sonra ilgileneceğim."

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯看都不看伊奥贡一眼，厉声道，{/n}“你的道歉没能让我满意，猴子。你唯一换来的，就是被拔掉舌头，不过这事我之后再处理。”
languages.original_text: {n}Without sparing Eogunn a glance, Tervantias snaps,{/n} "Your apologies failed to satisfy me, mon-keigh. The only thing you have earned is the removal of your tongue, but I will attend to that later."

traits.locale_text: {n}特万提亚斯看都不看伊奥贡一眼，厉声道，{/n}“你的道歉没能让我满意，猴子。你唯一换来的，就是被拔掉舌头，不过这事我之后再处理。”

languages.text: {n}エオガンに一瞥もくれることなく、テルヴァンティアスは吐き捨てる。{/n}「貴様の謝罪は私を満足させなかった、モンケイ。貴様が手にしたのは、舌を抜かれるという報いだけだ。もっとも、それは後で片づけてやる」
languages.original_text: {n}Without sparing Eogunn a glance, Tervantias snaps,{/n} "Your apologies failed to satisfy me, mon-keigh. The only thing you have earned is the removal of your tongue, but I will attend to that later."
